column1: Hey Lewis, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
sup were you still looking for help from us with spring break?
what's good we got your form on our website for some spring break options. were you still interested in info?
Awesome. what dates would you like to travel
hey lmk what dates your spring break is and i'll send over some options
hey were you still looking to go on spring break?
Awesome, how many ppl in your group?
My b bro I was knocked. 12 is solid tho, which school we all from
Okay bet yea I've only heard good things we got a few Mississippi groups rollin with us
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
Sounds good. All trying to get our money sorted out asap
okay bet yea I'll send what we have at the moment and add a payment plan. lets you reserve things with a deposit and then pay the rest off in a few weeks
is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
Le gusta “okay bet yea I'll send what we have at the moment and add a payment plan. lets you reserve things with a deposit and then pay the rest off in a few weeks”
just sent that over lmk if you got it
bet lmk what the squad think
Does the prices include the all inclusive food and drink?
Is there restrictions on alcoholic drink? And how the food work like is it in a cafeteria
Nah just like not the top top shelf liquor. But everything else is free game open bar multiple bars to stop at on the resort
Dining hall is like happen floor buffet style. All you can eat
yoo Lewis whats good bro, how we feelin about those options so far?
Is there transportation there? To get to the clubs cause its kinda far
yea transportation from the airport to the hotel, and from the hotel back to the airport
and then depending on which destination, punta cana we have transportation to the nightclubs if you do the party pass, and in cancun its a $1 trolly ride
Ok thats sweet. For the cancun oasis hotel do u get free entry to the events at the resort
How much the clubs entry looking now
for like the off resort party pass? its $210 for the 3 event pass comes with express entry, cover charge, and open bar
venues are D'Cave, Rakata, Hall of Fame, Mandala, Mandala Beach, Vaquita, and a few more
we also have the open bar booze cruise
Yeah bro What about like coco bonjo and the city
What is the open bar booze cruise exactly
its an open bar booze cruise party. super dope vibe I'll send a video of what it looks like
hey checkin in, we narrow in on which option we wanna roll with?
Yes mate. The grand oasis cancun
We r just sorting dates officially and everyone getting there money together
Got you. things are getting slim with availability so just lmk! def don't want y'all to miss out
When will availability go u think
Also can u get beers as part of the free alcohol or it just liquor
Im not too sure when it'll go. it happens randomly tbh
Out of curiosity is there a price if dont get an all inclusive package
that doesnt really exist unfortunately. the hotel itself is all inclusive for all ppl staying there
And how does it work with the buying?
yea if were ready to go I'll get your reservation started and send it over. each member of your group will hop in on an empty slot, add their details, and make their deposit to secure their spot
its a $200 deposit today and remaining balance due on the 9th. spreads it out a tiny bit so ppl can gather themselves
yoo checkin in brotha. were we lookin to start getting things situated for the group
Apologies bro. Yes bro, what is the deal if we only got 11 going?
We do want to get going just trying to get everyone sorted
Hi mate could we get going on it please
Hi Lewis. I'll make the reservation for you now. With 11 people it'll be two rooms of 4 and one room of 3
Did we want to do 4 nights, or 5 nights?
Could we keep the 11 people do it the same price as before
possibly, I'll have to put the request in. as of now the only different price will be that one room of 3
im going to set this up now and then put the request in for the discount
hey bro sending this over now. so the 4 person room price is 684, and the 3 person room is 779. I was able to discount and get everyone to the same price at 699 across the board. for all 11
that way you all pay the same price
So i just email everyone the email?
Yup! or just text everyone the link so they can each go in and secure their spot with the deposit
Can deposits be paid tomorrow. I know the email says today?
how many ppl needed to extend to tomorrow? I'll put the request in
Whats the deal if 2 bail and we end up with 9? Apologies. I think we r good but 2 being iffy
Some of us r booking now
no worries, with 9 we'd do three rooms of 3
with the discount I added itll adjust to 729 per person. so just 30 dollars more. if we do three rooms of 3
we get the 4 in tonight, and then the other 5-7 I will put a note on their slot that they'll be depositing tomorrow
we can adjust the reservation as we go. best to just get yourselves secured
Should hopefully get 7 in tonight with the other
Hopefully all 11 tomorrow and everything good
Does it not accept English card?
Should be fine, are you having trouble using it?
Yeah cause some r putting in English zip code n it's saying not valid
Hmm, I'll ask the tech team how we go about that. if not I'll send you a separate private link to pay and apply it to each of your accounts
does everyone have the UK card?
Lewis brother! I just texted Callum as well. here is a direct lmk you can use to make your $200 deposit
you can send this to the other guys as well, only the ones having trouble with the English credit card. the rest of the group can make their payments on their portal account
let me know when you do so that I can have accounting attach the payment to your account
Ah sorry man we kinda been done by our mates. Its only 9 of us going and the price now too much from what i first was
hey man, which price are you referring to?
Raises when it's 9 people from when was 12
And people now dont want to
when it was 12 it was 684. I can work on getting approved to keep the 699 price for the 9 of you
If I can get that, would you all be good to go
yo checkin in man, how's the group lookin?
So we got 9 going. 699 each with 3 rooms of 3?
Or can it be 4 rooms of 2 2 2 3?
yea for the 699 its gotta be 3 rooms of 3
we can do the other arrangements but the price is gonna be more
How much would it be for the 2
909 for the 2 person bro. Def more than the boys wanted to spend
Yeah 3 rooms of 3 for sure haha
Yall ready to lock it in?
Do we need the links again?
Yea that same link should be good to go
Can we still use the old link?
yup I just reactivated that for you
For the guys with the English cards, you can follow this link to make your deposit payment. Just let me know when you do so so that I can have accounting apply it to your account right away
this is the link to your reservation as well https://secure.springbreaku.com/site/public/package/ILLDMTJRAM
No prob. there are 4 ppl in the first room at the moment. just let me know who we need to move to one of the other rooms
The rooms gonna be: Lewis, Annabelle, Johann Ben, Liz, Russell Callum, Luke, Dan
Cool did you want to add any of the party pass events? Like the booze cruise
Nah man just the all inclusive and the parties at that resort sound good already
Cool bro. my ops team is on my back about the discount I gave you guys so we'll have to move quickly if possible bro
you each got a big discount
We all in class rn but should be done in next hours
Is it just the deposit rn
yea just the deposit. and creating your account
Saying what the room 2 909 instead of all 3 for 699
click the join this reservation button to see the room set up
Can we pay in full today?
Just let me know who the 4 guys are that need to use the direct payment link so that I can let accounting know
I think they have already paid it
Those 3 have all paid the deposit through the link already
There could be one more I'll let u know
Luke has paid in full but it's not told him he has Ik my room is all fully paid and others have done the deposit
So did Luke pay on the link, or on the reservation portal?
And what about Russell? did he use the link as well
I'm not sure about Russell yet
Cool I submitted those guys to accounting. Russell too just in case
Looks like Russell hasn't paid yet. mind hitting him up? ops is going to want to adjust his slot back to reg price soon
They r getting emails they haven't paid but they have?
Saw russel. the guys that paid on the stripe Iink are still being processed by accounting
Everyone has paid in full. We all good?
whats good bro. did those guys pay the remainder on the link again?
I believe dan Luke russell callum used it. Paid in full now Everyone else used the normal way and paid fully
Okay, can you ask Callum and Dan what day they made their 2nd payment. just so I can let accounting know
Russell made the full payment the first time so he's all set
Dan did it today. Just now
Apologies. Callum made the payment on Saturday 7th Feb
Morning bro, waiting for accounting to confirm and apply those to their accounts
hey bro just a heads up if Callum or Dan get another email today about payment they can disregard it for now. still working with accounting to get them finalized
Hi mate, hope you're well! Could we get a booking reservation for the hotel? Is everyones payment sorted too?
sup brotha sorry i missed this, we still need Callum and Daniel to pay and then you guys will be moved into pre departure and get all the info you need
disregard that, accounting is adding that to their accounts
Dan did it on February 10th and Callum did it on February 7th
gonna be a great time brother. can the rest of the guys add their flight info into their accounts so that we can get airport transportation sorted
are you all on different flights?
We r all on the same flight
I'll get them to do it
all good I got it brother
Could we get the booking confirmation please!?
hey bro! yea were you looking to call the resort?
Couple people just wanted the details of it bro
okay yea everyone is gonna get an email soon with details on how to find the transportation when you land, check in details, and events happening through your week. will be sending all of that soon!
Hi Spiffy, buzzing to go to cancun! Is there anything we need to print out?
I would just make sure you screenshot your vouchers, those are on your accounts
Callum and dan said they don't have an account. Could you help with that?
Hey brother. They both have accounts, that's how they've gotten all of our emails
They made accounts and created passwords the first day of sign ups
Callum and dan saying they can't get into there account. Says invalid when try get into account
All good. Ops team is tracking your flight #
